person.name: Walter de la Lynde
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Sir Walter de la Lynde (or Delalynde or Delalind[e]), lord of Bolebroke, county Sussex, was the son of John de la Lynde.

"Sir Walter, of Lesceby, co. Linc, was son of Sir John de la Lynde, who mar. Joanna, d. and coh. of Hugh de Neville. Hutchins in his "Hist. of Dorsetshire," says that De la Lynde bore gules 3 stags' heads couped arg., which is impaled by Trenchard; and De la Lynde impaling Seward, Hartley, and Hareng, and Williams impaling De la Lynd, Hartley, and Horsey. And the seal of Hartley is given as argent a cross engrailed gules, which must have been acquired by De la Lynde in marriage, the bucks' heads being their original coat. Hutchis says that, temp. Will. I., De la Lynde was in estimation at Blakemore. Wm. de la Lynde lived 43 Hen. III., and temp. P. & Mary Sir George de la Lynde was the last male."

Marriage & Children
Walter de la Lynde married Isabella and died without male issue, leaving five daughters his coheirs.

1.) Cecilia, married Herbert de Flinton.

2.) Margery, married John Stoford.

3.) Joan, married John Dalyngringe.

4.) Isabel, married Philip Parsafay.

5.) Amicia.

Inquisitions Post Mortem
10 December 1272 Writ, John de la Lynde.

14 January 1273 Dorset: Sir Walter de la Lynde, aged 25 and more, is his next heir

16 January 1273 Somerset: Walter de la Lynde, aged 27, is his next heir

16 January 1273 Somerset: Heir as above, of full age and a knight

16 Januray 1273 Lincoln: Sir Walter de la Linde, aged 24 and more, is his next heir

26 September 1318: John atte Grene of Layseby came before the king, on Tuesday after St. Matthew, and sought to replevy the manor of Bronfeld belonging to him, his wife Margery, Herbert de Flynton and Cicely his wife, Isabella daughter of Walter de la Lynde, and Amice her (ejus) sister, taken into the king's hands for their default before the justices of the Bench.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de la Lynde於大約1248年出生在英國英格蘭素可波萊布盧可時，他的父親Sir John de la Lynde29歲，母親Claricia De Hartley26歲。他於1299年與Joan De Neville De Heaton在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1301年9月10日在英國林可爾史爾享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lynde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lind
meanings: Scandinavian, English, and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived by a lime tree, Scandinavian and Middle English lind. As a Swedish name, it is often of ornamental origin.
North German and Danish: habitational name from any of various places called with Lind ‘lime tree’.
South German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a gentle, mild, tolerant man, from Middle High German lint, linde, Yiddish lind ‘gentle, mild’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de la Lynde was born about 1248, in Bolebrook, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de la Lynde, was 29 and his mother, Claricia De Hartley, was 26. He married Joan De Neville De Heaton in 1299, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 10 September 1301, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de la Lynde est né environ 1248, à Bolebrook, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de la Lynde, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Claricia De Hartley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Neville De Heaton en 1299, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1301, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de la Lynde um 1248 in Bolebrook, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de la Lynde 29 und seine Mutter Claricia De Hartley 26. Er hat 1299 in England Joan De Neville De Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. September 1301 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de la Lynde è nato il circa 1248 nel Bolebrook, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de la Lynde, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Claricia De Hartley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan De Neville De Heaton nel 1299, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 10 settembre 1301, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de la Lyndeが約1248年にイギリスイギリススセックスボレブルークで生まれた時，父Sir John de la Lyndeは29歳，母Claricia De Hartleyは26歳であった。1299年にイギリスでJoan De Neville De Heatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1301年9月10日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de la Lynde(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 볼레브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de la Lynde(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Claricia De Hartley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1299년 영국에서 Joan De Neville De Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 9월 10일 영국 링코실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de la Lynde nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Bolebrook, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de la Lynde, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Claricia De Hartley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan De Neville De Heaton em 1299, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1301, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de la Lynde родился около 1248 г. в местности болебрук, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de la Lynde было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Claricia De Hartley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Neville De Heaton в 1299 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 10 сентября 1301 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de la Lynde nació aproximadamente 1248, en Bolebrook, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de la Lynde, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Claricia De Hartley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan De Neville De Heaton en 1299, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1301, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
